llm_operation.reason: TensorFlow要求updates.shape[:-1] == indices.shape[:-1]且每个update对应index指向的slice；Paddle要求updates.shape == index.shape[:-1] + shape[index.shape[-1]:]。原用例indices.shape=[10,2], shape=[10,5] => index.shape[-1]=2 <= len(shape)=2，故updates应为[10]而非[10,2]。
